Content:
Learn Git With Me

Learn Git with Me is a free, open-source platform for learning Git and GitHub.

## ⚡ Live Try it out for yourself! Visit: ## ⭐ Features ### 🐭 Frameworks - **[Next.js](https://nextjs.org/)** - The React Framework for the Web (with **App Directory**) ### 🐮 Platforms - **[Vercel](https://vercel.com/)** – Deploy your Next.js app with ease ### 🐒 UI - **[Tailwind CSS](https://tailwindcss.com/)** – Utility-first CSS framework for rapid UI development - **[Shadcn/ui](https://ui.shadcn.com/)** – Re-usable components built using Radix UI and Tailwind CSS - **[next/font](https://nextjs.org/docs/basic-features/font-optimization)** – Optimize custom fonts and remove external network requests for improved performance - **[MDX](https://mdxjs.com/docs)** – Markdown for the components ### 🐴 Code Quality - **[TypeScript](https://www.typescriptlang.org/)** – Static type checker for end-to-end type safety - **[Prettier](https://prettier.io/)** – Opinionated code formatted for consistent code style
Translation:
跟我学 Git

跟我学 Git 是一个免费、开源的学习 Git 和 GitHub 的平台。

## ⚡ 线上体验 自己试试吧！ 访问： ## ⭐ 功能 ### 🐭 框架 - **[Next.js](https://nextjs.org/)** - Web 的 React 框架（带有 **App 目录**） ### 🐮 平台 - **[Vercel](https://vercel.com/)** – 轻松部署你的 Next.js 应用 ### 🐒 界面 - **[Tailwind CSS](https://tailwindcss.com/)** – 实用优先的 CSS 框架，用于快速 UI 开发 - **[Shadcn/ui](https://ui.shadcn.com/)** – 基于 Radix UI 和 Tailwind CSS 构建的可复用组件 - **[next/font](https://nextjs.org/docs/basic-features/font-optimization)** – 优化自定义字体，移除外部网络请求以提升性能 - **[MDX](https://mdxjs.com/docs)** – 组件化的 Markdown ### 🐴 代码质量 - **[TypeScript](https://www.typescriptlang.org/)** – 静态类型检查器，实现端到端的类型安全 - **[Prettier](https://prettier.io/)** – 有明确风格的代码格式化工具，保持代码风格一致

RowTranslations.originContent: Learn Git with Me is a free, open-source platform for learning Git and GitHub.
RowTranslations.translatedContent: 跟我学 Git 是一个免费、开源的学习 Git 和 GitHub 的平台。

RowTranslations.originContent: - **[Next.js](https://nextjs.org/)** - The React Framework for the Web (with **App Directory**)
RowTranslations.translatedContent: - **[Next.js](https://nextjs.org/)** - Web 的 React 框架（带有 **App 目录**）

RowTranslations.originContent: - **[Vercel](https://vercel.com/)** – Deploy your Next.js app with ease
RowTranslations.translatedContent: - **[Vercel](https://vercel.com/)** – 轻松部署你的 Next.js 应用

RowTranslations.originContent: - **[Tailwind CSS](https://tailwindcss.com/)** – Utility-first CSS framework for rapid UI development
RowTranslations.translatedContent: - **[Tailwind CSS](https://tailwindcss.com/)** – 实用优先的 CSS 框架，用于快速 UI 开发

RowTranslations.originContent: - **[Shadcn/ui](https://ui.shadcn.com/)** – Re-usable components built using Radix UI and Tailwind CSS
RowTranslations.translatedContent: - **[Shadcn/ui](https://ui.shadcn.com/)** – 基于 Radix UI 和 Tailwind CSS 构建的可复用组件

RowTranslations.originContent: - **[next/font](https://nextjs.org/docs/basic-features/font-optimization)** – Optimize custom fonts and remove external network requests for improved performance
RowTranslations.translatedContent: - **[next/font](https://nextjs.org/docs/basic-features/font-optimization)** – 优化自定义字体，移除外部网络请求以提升性能

RowTranslations.originContent: - **[TypeScript](https://www.typescriptlang.org/)** – Static type checker for end-to-end type safety
RowTranslations.translatedContent: - **[TypeScript](https://www.typescriptlang.org/)** – 静态类型检查器，实现端到端的类型安全

RowTranslations.originContent: - **[Prettier](https://prettier.io/)** – Opinionated code formatted for consistent code style
RowTranslations.translatedContent: - **[Prettier](https://prettier.io/)** – 有明确风格的代码格式化工具，保持代码风格一致

Content:
- **[ESLint](https://eslint.org/)** – Pluggable linter for Next.js and TypeScript


### 🐑 Performance

- **[Vercel Analytics](https://vercel.com/analytics)** – Real-time performance metrics for your Next.js app



## 📦 Apps and Packages

- `web`: The main Next.js application
- `UI`: Shared UI components


## Contributing

Visit our [contributing guide](https://github.com/spaciousejar/learn-git-with-me/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md) to learn how to contribute.
- your feedback and contributions are welcome!


## 📜 License

This project is licensed under the MIT License. For more information, see the [LICENSE](./LICENSE) file.

You can check out [the Next.js GitHub repository](https://github.com/vercel/next.js/)
Translation:
- **[ESLint](https://eslint.org/)** – 适用于 Next.js 和 TypeScript 的可插拔代码检查工具


### 🐑 性能

- **[Vercel Analytics](https://vercel.com/analytics)** – 适用于您的 Next.js 应用的实时性能指标



## 📦 应用和包

- `web`：主要的 Next.js 应用
- `UI`：共享的 UI 组件


## 贡献

访问我们的[贡献指南](https://github.com/spaciousejar/learn-git-with-me/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md)了解如何贡献。
- 欢迎您的反馈和贡献！


## 📜 许可

本项目采用 MIT 许可证。更多信息请参见[许可证文件](./LICENSE)。

您可以查看[Next.js 的 GitHub 仓库](https://github.com/vercel/next.js/)
